steps.title: Use the work described
steps.content: The sentence explains that excavating the fossil can take weeks or months of hard, physically tiring work. The missing word should describe a process that requires effort and time.

steps.title: Reject opposite meanings
steps.content: Choice A is about cost, not effort. Choice B contradicts weeks or months by suggesting speed. Choice C says the process is ordinary or frequent, which does not follow from the description of hard work. The answer is D.
